text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The sleek, modern lines and glass walls evoke clarity, yet also separation. Entering the R+D space, I am struck by the interplay between art and technology, the collision of knowledge and creativity. I sense the invisible current of progress, the hum of innovation, and wonder about the possibilities that lie at the edge of human-machine cooperation. Am I an observer, or a participant in this grand experiment? The environment prompts me to ponder the paradox of simplicity and complexity—how every creation is the result of unseen layers of thought and discovery.
